summary: HandyHub i18n & Profile Form Features - All tests passed (70/70). Verified: 1) Booking modal correctly translates based on language selector (English/Ukrainian/Spanish), 2) Step labels translate correctly, 3) Task types translate correctly, 4) Add Payment button opens form with card fields (Card Number, Expiry, CVV, Name), 5) Add Address button opens form with address fields (Label, Street, City, ZIP).

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend changes to test

booking_modal_i18n.description: MultiStepBookingModal uses i18n translations based on selected language
tests: Clicking service opens Multi-Step Booking Modal in English
Booking Modal Step 1 shows English content
Language switch to Ukrainian translates booking modal
Booking Modal Step 1 shows Ukrainian content after language switch

booking_modal_step_labels.description: Step labels translate correctly (Details, Address, Time, Additional, Confirm)
tests: English: Details, Address, Time, Additional, Confirm
Ukrainian: Деталі, Адреса, Час, Додатково, Підтвердження
English: Repair, Cleaning, Installation, Moving, Delivery, Other
Ukrainian: Ремонт, Прибирання, Монтаж, Переїзд, Доставка, Інше

add_payment_form.description: Add Payment button opens form with card fields
tests: Payment methods section expands and shows Add button
Add Payment button opens form with card fields
Form shows: Card Number, Expiry, CVV, Name fields

add_address_form.description: Add Address button opens form with address fields
tests: Addresses section expands and shows Add button
Add Address button opens form with address fields
Form shows: Label, Street and building number, City, ZIP fields

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. MultiStepBookingModal now uses useLanguage hook and t() function for translations. Client profile has working Add Payment and Add Address forms with Cancel/Save functionality. Full regression suite passes (70 tests across 8 spec files).
